prerequisites: A Shippo account with API access (sign up at goshippo.com).

A Shippo API token (the "shippo_token" config field). Generate it in the Shippo dashboard under the API Configuration menu by selecting Developer keys. Shippo issues separate test keys (prefixed shippo_test_) and live keys (prefixed shippo_live_); the full key is shown only once, so copy and store it securely.
A start date (the "start_date" config field) marking the earliest point from which records should be synced.

authMethods.name: API token (ShippoToken)
authMethods.summary: Shippo authenticates each request with an account API key sent in the HTTP header as `Authorization: ShippoToken <API_TOKEN>`. Provide this key as the shippo_token config value. Use a live key (shippo_live_...) for production data or a test key (shippo_test_...) against the test environment.

setupSteps.title: Create or sign in to a Shippo account
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Shippo dashboard, or create an account at goshippo.com if you do not have one. API access is available from the dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API token
setupSteps.body: In the Shippo dashboard, open the API Configuration menu and select Developer keys. Create or copy an API key. Shippo provides distinct test keys (shippo_test_...) and live keys (shippo_live_...); pick the one matching the environment you want to read. The full key is displayed only once, so store it in a secure place.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the shippo_token config field to the API key you generated. The connector sends it to the Shippo API (https://api.goshippo.com) using the `Authorization: ShippoToken <API_TOKEN>` header.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date config field to the earliest date from which the connector should pull records.
